base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment explicitly uses TMT labeling (TMT 10plex) and data-dependent acquisition (DDA) on Q Exactive and Orbitrap Fusion Lumos instruments.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study explicitly performs Thermal Proteome Profiling (TPP) and 2D-TPP to measure protein thermal stability shifts.
The study develops and utilizes a 'Solubility Proteome Profiling (SPP)' strategy to quantify the effect of ATP on protein solubility.
